MIME-Version: 1.0
From: Start Daily <microsoft.start@email2.microsoft.com>
To: emil.skogsund@gmail.com
Date: Wed, 22 May 2024 04:32:34 -0700
Subject: Norway, Ireland and Spain recognize Palestinian state; Israel condemns move
Message-ID: <664dd7d7.050a0220.37838.299bSMTPIN_ADDED_BROKEN@mx.google.com>
Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8"

<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en-us"><head><meta charset="utf-8"><meta content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" name="viewport"><title>Start Daily</title></head><body bgcolor="#f0f0f0"><table align="center" bgcolor="#f0f0f0" border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" dir="left" style="font-family:Segoe UI,-apple-system,helvetica Neue,Helvetica,Lucida Grande,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif" width="100%">
        <tr><td><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" height="52" style="background-color:#fff;box-shadow:0 3px 0 transparent" width="600"><tr><td align="left" style="padding:0;min-width:150px;min-height:50px;vertical-align:middle"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAACFE3IFUOLKSXH3ONRFHV5SCAETMEG6GY7KDYQ2DQZAP6PU66STBV2NFYUFWUJVOGBXQVIJZZLUZ6MOSLRMJF4YMZGN2JNIKNNZUQHBLAKUNGMWXOXI7WGJNWBBK3YTY4C35VSALDVM2B66EKQQAT6KYW2PGJUOLVLWHSH7J7TC7X23INGH2C&d=AIAACKW3A5PTDNSXDUTICBXO52M377OXXME5E43DOKHQWBQZYVBLU5JASRKNQMX2WSTEX6THKXM6YP64JVJALZ6RSTHHJ4CB4KJTHO7AHWK3DUDWC2S37BXKLSXGP2IOGGMJLP3WPDCZZXTHP4HDQACU4O2RRLHGFDV3JDHRGK2PPN53LBV5XCGGQ7ZPN7KRN5HRSK34PZ6WPOW6QM&" id="NewHeaderMicrosoftStartImg" style="border:none" target="_blank"><img alt="MSN" height="45" src="https://www.bing.com/th?id=OEP.34427CBFF3D4D1C8119FED16222B4DEE&pid=BEmail" style="border:none;text-align:center" width="150"></a></td></tr></table></td></tr>

        <!-- @Subject: Norway, Ireland and Spain recognize Palestinian state; Israel condemns move -->
           <tr><td><table style="background-color:#fff;box-shadow:0 5px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.1)" align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" width="600"><tr><td><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAAC2SKZZG2OTUN2TLJ67VKZ6KX2J6XFVFEDU35A6F6LABNS6VITX2GVTTDO2HCFV4V7JUIKHLXE7LPXM6IRQSD2HBUNE2U5MNUWKODZPBATKF4TZOIGHNUQNYO3XKTORX4VW73J7QAC7A3HLK23NNNEMEACSBY45NDYQ7Q33SKLVSIHXIUCZVA&" id="LrgCardImage1|BB1mPrV9" style="color:#333;text-decoration:none" target="_blank"><img height="350" src="https://th.bing.com/th?id=ORMS.aa460845abcbd0aa1af8d7c59909a4a7&pid=Wdp&w=600&h=350&dpr=1&c=8&rs=2" style="border:none;margin:0" width="600"></a></td></tr><tr><td style="padding:20px 20px 8px 20px;font-size:28px;line-height:1.2;color:#333;font-weight:400;text-decoration:none"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAADUAFA63EL4QPOHOYP4YDYITM2QSCAN6WB22YQXEIKZ2BMZOCL53X2QEBOGWDVZ2T5WDESCS33VO4X77RWFCE22343YW7CBIGJ5WBS2EC6VOEVYVM7VUF3I2256Y4Z4TAFNF3FB5S6Y2B47NXDODZ2Z34OA7RXMDZ6RJVEQ5YHJCOFQNIUZH3&" id="LrgCardTitle1|BB1mPrV9" style="color:#333;text-decoration:none" target="_blank">Norway, Ireland and Spain recognize Palestinian state; Israel condemns move</a></td></tr><tr><td style="padding:0 20px 11px 20px;font-size:18px;color:#333;text-decoration:none;line-height:1.3"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAAD7JPJGRUULIG6XYT2XZOTLEGJQIO6U2HGOSPHLSWOAKZVRLTCG4JIHUJKLQFC5OHRILHTBVNUVLDRS3L3BQTOQBF6WK3KEWGUYULPR7OBWHRV73NFNRSPB2TJQYBMVJPGYUK4KIWQ6YKCVNS664F7GSTJJYYASCHRGM4TP5ESJNKTKU2PVLU46AWO5DYD6EHZWK5G3UR4QR37U&" id="LrgCardSummary1|BB1mPrV9" style="color:#333;text-decoration:none" target="_blank">The diplomatic moves are purely symbolic — but not without some power.</a></td></tr><tr><td height="25"><table style="margin:0 20px 15px 37px"><tr><td style="padding-right:12px;padding-top:5px" height="28"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAAC567I26CZGVX6REX6V3LH5QIXA25JMRUV37AHSW5EKJD3ZHZATMMHLERZIRK6LS3ZJRDWTB44BUGEDBTCW7JZTSROAVSCMC23NVB2PUCFYXQRDFUWZW6WWOP7ER6QUBVL7J46RL6YMRC4SJCRRWQZ4BON43NIEFIVOBBGLNSBBEF7GRDWC3HBG34NVDXBU4KZH6U72C2ANECC4&" id="LrgCardProviderLogo1|BB1mPrV9" style="color:#333;text-decoration:none" target="_blank"><img height="28" src="https://img-s-msn-com.akamaized.net/tenant/amp/entityid/AAyxkRJ.img?w=28&h=28&m=6&q=60&u=t&o=t&l=f&f=jpg" style="border:none" alt=""></a></td><td style="font-size:18px;text-decoration:none;line-height:1.2;border:none;color:#666" height="28"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAACWGGFWNXTJL26TXX5NERYPFC33CK5FZJV2QE5F4KCKOUL6PAZI7O2GTE7CNSNEAC5VFQKO327F4WTXWKBYKY2HKTKOSISMU3JWG5U3UC5PUNZZH2JYEMJGCFHKZSNZ3CJA3N53QWB6FOAWRJDIP4OGQIKQTQEOUQ77ZDP2KLUMLGG4YEZOV3JUTAFYWEHS6TPWSGHZ7W55RWEI&" id="LrgCardProviderNamePos1|BB1mPrV9" style="color:#333;text-decoration:none" target="_blank">The Washington Post</a></td></tr></table></td></tr></table></td></tr>
